Title: http_body_read
Description: Reads the HTTP body from the client HTTP connection and returns it as a string.

This function reads the HTTP body from the client HTTP connection and returns it as a string output.
This is suitable for processing POST requests with bodies encoded differently than multipart/* and application/x-www-form-urlencoded as in SOAP requests where the POST body is encoded as text/xml ).
Examples:
<?vsp
declare ses any;
ses := http_body_read ();
http_header ('Content-Type: text/xml\r\n');
http (string_output_string (ses));
?>
